fields.name: Yi Sang
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 1, drawn from the works of the Korean modernist poet Yi Sang.

fields.name: Faust
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 2, Limbus Company's knowledgeable strategist, drawn from Goethe's Faust.

fields.name: Don Quixote
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 3, drawn from Cervantes' Don Quixote.

fields.name: Ryōshū
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 4, drawn from Akutagawa's Hell Screen (Jigokuhen).

fields.name: Meursault
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 5, drawn from Camus' The Stranger (L'Étranger).

fields.name: Hong Lu
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 6, drawn from Cao Xueqin's Dream of the Red Chamber.

fields.name: Heathcliff
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 7, drawn from Emily Brontë's Wuthering Heights.

fields.name: Ishmael
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 8, drawn from Melville's Moby-Dick.

fields.name: Rodion
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 9, drawn from Dostoevsky's Crime and Punishment.

fields.name: Sinclair
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 10, drawn from Hermann Hesse's Demian.

fields.name: Outis
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 11, drawn from Homer's Odyssey ("Outis" — "Nobody" — the name Odysseus gives the Cyclops).

fields.name: Gregor
fields.value: LCB Sinner No. 12, drawn from Kafka's The Metamorphosis.
